series_metadata.series_description: Manufacturer certification that the motorized bicycle complies with the performance and equipment standards/requirements of OAC and that the model meets the definition of a motorized bicycle in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until form is no longer used or relevant or the certification process is obsolete. ; Electronic: Retain until form is no longer used or relevant or the certification process is obsolete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
